topic: cozy oat milk latte for fall mornings
title: Cozy Oat Milk Latte for Fall Mornings

scenes.caption: POV: the first cold morning of fall hits different
scenes.imagePrompt: A woman in her late 20s with wavy auburn shoulder-length hair, light freckles, wearing an oversized cream knit sweater, standing by a rain-streaked kitchen window in a small cozy apartment with warm wood cabinets, dried orange leaves and a small pumpkin on the sill, holding her arms wrapped around herself looking sleepy and content. Photorealistic, shot on iPhone, natural overcast window light, 35mm, shallow depth of field, film grain, candid, unposed, authentic, imperfect.
